nasb.text: Now while Paul was waiting for them at Athens, his spirit was being provoked within him as he was observing the city full of idols.

esv.text: Now while Paul was waiting for them at Athens, his spirit was provoked within him as he saw that the city was full of idols.

cnv.text: 保羅在雅典等候他們的時候，看見滿城都是偶像，心靈十分忿激。

ccb.text: 保罗在雅典等候他们的时候，看见满城都是偶像，心里非常着急。

csbs.text: 保罗在雅典等候赛拉斯和提摩太的时候，看见满城都是偶像，他灵里被激怒。
